name: Moringa
summary: It is best framed as a nutrient-dense botanical with mixed translational evidence rather than as a universal superfood -all.
description: It is best framed as a nutrient-dense botanical with mixed translational evidence rather than as a universal superfood cure-all.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: Potential additive effects with antidiabetic and antihypertensive therapies
theoretical interaction with thyroid-active therapy in high-dose extracts.
